description_long: This is a two-story wooden cabin with a steep gable roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic appearance. The front facade features two large square windows on the ground floor and a pair of rectangular windows on the upper floor. On one side, a wooden staircase leads up to a covered porch and a door, providing access to the upper level. The roof has a pronounced overhang, and the windows are symmetrically arranged on the visible facades. The structure is elevated slightly above the ground, supported by wooden posts beneath the porch and stairs.
description: A two-story rustic wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a side staircase leading to a covered porch and entrance.
description_view_0: The front view shows the symmetrical facade with two large square windows on the ground floor and two rectangular windows above, all framed by horizontal wooden planks.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the steep, shingled gable roof and reveals the wooden staircase and porch structure attached to the right side.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back facade with a covered porch, staircase, and a single door, as well as the upper and lower windows.
description_view_3: The top-down view emphasizes the wide, shingled gable roof and the porch structure extending from one side.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with steep pitch, covered in gray asphalt shingles and moderate overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Four windows visible: two large square windows on the lower front facade, two rectangular windows on the upper front facade, all symmetrically arranged
attribute_door_placement: One exterior door located on the side, accessible via a staircase and covered porch
